memory.summary: The room is too smelly and cluttered for focus, but my roommate seems friendly. Moving to the library now might help with my low energy.
Moving to the library restores focus but leaves sleep debt unresolved. I must address the room's odor tonight or it will continue disrupting my rest.
Two hours of focused work improved my reading response progress to 0.48, but I still face unresolved sleep debt and room odor issues.
After two hours of work, my reading response progress increased to 0.62, but I still face unresolved sleep debt and room odor issues.
I completed 2 hours of work, raising my reading response progress to 0.73. My roommate is back in the room, presenting a new opportunity to address the odor issue before sleep.

I successfully resolved the odor issue with roommate_R through a direct, kind conversation. They apologized and promised to act immediately, so I can now focus on rest or finishing my work without lingering tension.
Progress on the reading response increased from 0.73 to 0.80 in two hours, bringing me closer to completion despite remaining sleep debt.
I gained 0.06 progress on the reading response and rested well tonight, but I still carry a 2-hour sleep debt with moderate stress.
I made additional progress on the reading response, raising it to 0.92, but my energy is depleted and sleep debt remains high.
Progress on the reading response reached 0.98 after two hours, nearing completion despite severe sleep debt and depleted energy.
The reading response is now 100% complete. Despite finishing this task, my energy is zero and I still have a 2-hour sleep debt with high stress.
Resolving the conflict with roommate_R improved our relationship, yet my energy is depleted and stress remains high after finishing all tasks.

args.content: Hey, noticed the room smells strong again. Can we agree to do laundry together tonight so it clears up?

action.reasoning: g1 is high priority but progress is only 0.732%; g2 affects sleep quality and focus. Roommate trust is neutral (5), so direct communication is safe and efficient compared to avoiding the issue or moving locations.
